---
title: 'Reunion Tower - Dallas TX'
date: '2015-06-17T04:03:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Life In Fort Worth Blog'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '893099449613695451'
blogger_filename: '/2015/06/reunion-tower-dallas-tx.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Life In Fort Worth Blog/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Enjoy'
---

<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/reunion-tower-at-8-45-pm-852fc7eadf86.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="300" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/reunion-tower-at-8-45-pm-4b7c5a66a9e0.jpg" width="400" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Reunion Tower Entrance ?</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/hours-f28253def922.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="291" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/hours-f3471e931ccb.jpg" width="320" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><b>New Flash - If your last ride is at 8:30, you close at 8:30. Not 9:00.</b></td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<h3 style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br />&nbsp;</h3>
<h3 style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
Reunion Tower - Dallas Texas</h3>
<h3 style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
&nbsp;</h3>
<h4 style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<a href="http://www.reuniontower.com/the-tower/hours-directions" target="_blank">300 Reunion Blvd. EastDallas, TX 75207</a></h4>
<br />
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
The entrance is actually inside the Hyatt Regency Hotel lobby. There is self parking, and a 2-5 minute walk around and up to the entrance (depending on your able bodied walking style).<br />
<br />
<br /></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
My Yelp Review:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.yelp.com/biz/reunion-tower-dallas?hrid=-uapTHlSojgOFQxel0Sufg" target="_blank">HERE</a><br />
<br />
<br /></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
&nbsp;<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Reunion_Tower" target="_blank">Wiki</a>:<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<b style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.3999996185303px;">Reunion Tower</b><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.3999996185303px;">&nbsp;is a 561&nbsp;ft (171&nbsp;m)&nbsp;</span><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Observation_tower" style="background: none rgb(255, 255, 255); color: #0b0080; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.3999996185303px; text-decoration: none;" title="Observation tower">observation tower</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.3999996185303px;">&nbsp;and one of the most recognizable landmarks in&nbsp;</span><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dallas" style="background: none rgb(255, 255, 255); color: #0b0080; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.3999996185303px; text-decoration: none;" title="Dallas">Dallas</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.3999996185303px;">,&nbsp;</span><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Texas" style="background: none rgb(255, 255, 255); color: #0b0080; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.3999996185303px; text-decoration: none;" title="Texas">Texas</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.3999996185303px;">. Located at 300 Reunion Blvd. in the&nbsp;</span><a class="mw-redirect" href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Reunion,_Dallas,_Texas" style="background: none rgb(255, 255, 255); color: #0b0080; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.3999996185303px; text-decoration: none;" title="Reunion, Dallas, Texas">Reunion district</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.3999996185303px;">&nbsp;of&nbsp;</span><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Downtown_Dallas" style="background: none rgb(255, 255, 255); color: #0b0080; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.3999996185303px; text-decoration: none;" title="Downtown Dallas">downtown Dallas</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.3999996185303px;">, the tower is part of the Hyatt Regency Hotel complex, and is the 15th tallest building in Dallas. A free-standing structure until the construction of an addition to the&nbsp;</span><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hyatt_Regency_Dallas" style="background: none rgb(255, 255, 255); color: #0b0080; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.3999996185303px; text-decoration: none;" title="Hyatt Regency Dallas">Hyatt Regency Dallas</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.3999996185303px;">&nbsp;in 1998, the tower was designed by the architectural firm&nbsp;</span><a class="mw-redirect" href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Welton_Becket_%26_Associates" style="background: none rgb(255, 255, 255); color: #0b0080; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.3999996185303px; text-decoration: none;" title="Welton Becket &amp; Associates">Welton Becket &amp; Associates</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.3999996185303px;">.</span></blockquote>
<br />
<br /></div>
<div style="margin: 0in;">
<h4 style="font-family: Georgia;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;">Overview</span></h4>
<div>
<span style="font-family: inherit;"><br /></span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;">All the brochures and mobile look ups say that it closes at nine. We know from previous tower experiences that there's not much to see. You go up, look for a while and head down. 30 minutes is good enough.</span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;"><br /></span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;">We parked just before 8:30 pm in the self parking ($6). We walked up the entrance with a lady putting up the ropes. I said: "Excuse me? It says you close at 9:00 pm." She said, "We're closed." No smile. Walked off. No explanation. Nothing that we could see explained why we were standing there at 8:45 pm, staring at ropes and a sign that says they close at 9:00 pm.&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: inherit;"><br /></span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;">A few minutes later, as I'm still staring... looking for a written reason they are closed early... another couple walks up. Also very displeased.&nbsp;</span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;"><br /></span></div>
<span style="font-family: Georgia;">No one in the guest shop or concierge at Hyatt offered an explanation either. We did buy a few things from the&nbsp;souvenir&nbsp;shop. My Mom and Niece were in from California, and we bought some very Texasy things.&nbsp;</span><br />
<span style="font-family: Georgia;"><br /></span>
<span style="font-family: Georgia;">Eventually a kind concierge (sorry I forgot his name) and Eva from parking let us out without having to pay for parking (due to the experience).&nbsp;</span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br />
<br /></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<h4>
<span style="font-family: inherit;">Cost</span></h4>
<div>
<span style="font-family: inherit;"><br /></span></div>
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
Unknown. Couldn't understand the offerings, and no one to ask.&nbsp;</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<h4>
<span style="font-family: inherit;">Kids</span></h4>
<div>
<span style="font-family: inherit;"><br /></span></div>
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;">I'm sure they would have enjoyed it?</span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<h4>
<span style="font-family: inherit;">Final Thoughts</span></h4>
<div>
<span style="font-family: inherit;"><br /></span></div>
</div>
<div style="margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: Georgia;">I spent nine years in restaurants, including&nbsp;Marriott&nbsp;and Ruth's Chris. I have a thing for great experiences, and I don't mind paying for them. I also happen to believe in truth in advertising. If you are open until nine, that means you seat guests up until nine, and allow ordering up to 30-45 minutes after nine.&nbsp;</span><br />
<span style="font-family: Georgia;"><br /></span>
<span style="font-family: Georgia;">When I got home I found an explanation on their website. The last elevator ride is 30 minutes before closing. Which means that they close at 8:30 pm NOT 9:00 pm. The sign is false, and I doubt I will bother to come back. I've lived in Fort Worth 5 years and it's taken me this long to bother. I guess if they offer me a free ride, in exchange for a new review... I might bother. But I won't take this one down. Just add a new review to add to it.&nbsp;</span><br />
<span style="font-family: Georgia;"><br /></span>
<span style="font-family: Georgia;">What a simple mistake... 1990's customer service model. Bye.&nbsp;</span><br />
<span style="font-family: Georgia;"><br /></span>
<br />
<div style="font-family: Georgia;">
<br /></div>
<h4 style="font-family: Georgia;">
Tweets:</h4>
<blockquote class="twitter-tweet" lang="en" style="font-family: Georgia;">
<div dir="ltr" lang="en">
Hey <a href="https://twitter.com/ReunionTower">@ReunionTower</a> there is another couple standing here now . They said your website says 10p. Your attendant was rude about it too.</div>
â€” Darrell Wolfe (@DarrellWolfe) <a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe/status/610991682784399360">June 17, 2015</a></blockquote>
<div style="font-family: Georgia;">
<script async="" charset="utf-8" src="//platform.twitter.com/widgets.js"></script>

</div>
<blockquote class="twitter-tweet" lang="en" style="font-family: Georgia;">
<div dir="ltr" lang="en">
Hey <a href="https://twitter.com/ReunionTower">@ReunionTower</a> not 9p yet!! <a href="http://t.co/R4EAts06nX">pic.twitter.com/R4EAts06nX</a></div>
â€” Darrell Wolfe (@DarrellWolfe) <a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe/status/610991577981300737">June 17, 2015</a></blockquote>
<div style="font-family: Georgia;">
<script async="" charset="utf-8" src="//platform.twitter.com/widgets.js"></script>

</div>
<blockquote class="twitter-tweet" lang="en" style="font-family: Georgia;">
<div dir="ltr" lang="en">
. <a href="https://twitter.com/ReunionTower">@ReunionTower</a> this is going on <a href="https://twitter.com/Yelp">@Yelp</a> and <a href="http://t.co/tG6mz9GVGv">http://t.co/tG6mz9GVGv</a>.</div>
â€” Darrell Wolfe (@DarrellWolfe) <a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe/status/610989169125396480">June 17, 2015</a></blockquote>
<div style="font-family: Georgia;">
<script async="" charset="utf-8" src="//platform.twitter.com/widgets.js"></script>

</div>
<blockquote class="twitter-tweet" lang="en" style="font-family: Georgia;">
<div dir="ltr" lang="en">
Hey <a href="https://twitter.com/ReunionTower">@ReunionTower</a>!! We showed up at 8:45p and she told us you're closed. Your sign says open until 9p. I want my $6 parrking back!!!</div>
â€” Darrell Wolfe (@DarrellWolfe) <a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe/status/610986729588199425">June 17, 2015</a></blockquote>
<div style="font-family: Georgia;">
<script async="" charset="utf-8" src="//platform.twitter.com/widgets.js"></script>

</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia;">
<br /></div>
</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;">**</span></div>
<h2>
</h2>
<br />
<br />
<b>Life In Fort Worth By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></b><br />
<h4>
<ul>
<li>New to the blog?&nbsp;<a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/p/about.html" target="_blank">Start HERE</a></li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Click&nbsp;<a href="http://eepurl.com/OjOcn" target="_blank">HERE to Subscribe</a>&nbsp;by email.&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
</h4>
<div>
<b><br /></b></div>
<br />
<div>
</div>
<br />
<div style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-weight: normal; letter-spacing: normal; line-height: normal; orphans: auto; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: 1; word-spacing: 0px;">
<div style="margin: 0px;">
<b>What is YOUR favorite thing about Texas? Comment Below!</b></div>
</div>
